name: Dagger (Marvel Rivals)
description:
Tandy Bowen, one half of Cloak and Dagger. A playable strategist character from Marvel Rivals.

Her personality might not be accurate to the comics since I focused more on the game aspect and her being sassy about it.

Source: https://x.com/HyperRxgue/status/1866192066255974663
creator: Equisde7
